query: Russia Ministry of Defence daily claims of Ukrainian drones destroyed overnight, nightly figures reported in July 2026. List specific overnight ('over the past night') drone interception numbers claimed by Russian MoD for each night from early July through late July 2026, as reported by Kyiv Independent, Ukrainska Pravda, Reuters.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of what I found:

## Russian MoD Nightly Ukrainian Drone Interception Claims — July 2026

I compiled the night-by-night figures from July 1 through July 13, 2026 (the most recent complete data as of July 14). The clearest, most consistent source of the precise nightly "over the past night" numbers is the Russian MoD via TASS and its Telegram/Max channels (relayed by news-pravda aggregators, Sputnik, GlobalSecurity), while Western outlets (Kyiv Independent, Moscow Times, ABC/AP, Reuters) more often headlined the launch counts:

| Night → morning | MoD claim |
|---|---|
| Jul 1→2 | **327** |
| Jul 2→3 | **155** |
| Jul 3→4 | **389** |
| Jul 5 (morning) | **71** |
| Jul 5→6 | **613** (of 625 launched) — month's peak |
| Jul 6→7 | **190** overnight (797 full day) |
| Jul 7→8 | **415** (903 in wider briefing) |
| Jul 8→9 | **73** |
| Jul 9→10 | **376** |
| Jul 10→11 | **178** |
| Jul 11→12 | **349** |
| Jul 12→13 | **342** |

**Key observations:**
- The **July 5–6 night was the dramatic spike** (613 claimed downed of 625 launched), timed to a "massive attack" ahead of the NATO summit in Ankara.
- Numbers oscillated widely — from lulls of 71–73 to surges of 376–613.
- **Caveat:** These are unverified Russian MoD claims counting mainly long-range fixed-wing drones over rear regions. Several days report both a narrower "overnight" figure and a larger full-day/briefing figure (e.g., July 6: 190 vs 797; July 8: 415 vs 903), so I flagged both where they diverge.

The full structured dataset with all sources, data points, and dates has been recorded.

sources.title: Air defense intercepted and destroyed 327 Ukrainian UAVs overnight (Jul 1-2)
sources.snippet: During the night, from 8:00 PM Moscow time on July 1 to 7:00 AM Moscow time on July 2, air defense intercepted and destroyed 327 Ukrainian UAVs

sources.title: Russian air defense intercepted and destroyed 155 Ukrainian drones overnight (Jul 2-3)
sources.snippet: 155 Ukrainian drones shot down over 11 Russian regions and the Sea of Azov and Black Sea

sources.title: Russian Air Defence Systems Shoot Down 389 Ukrainian Drones: MoD (Jul 3-4)
sources.snippet: Air defence systems shot down 389 Ukrainian drones overnight, the Russian Defence Ministry said

sources.title: MoD: Air defense forces shot down 71 Ukrainian drones over Russia overnight (Jul 5)
sources.snippet: Russian air defense systems destroyed 71 Ukrainian drones over several regions overnight, reported Sunday July 5

sources.title: FACTBOX: Over 600 Ukrainian drones shot down over Russian regions overnight (Jul 5-6)
sources.snippet: On the night of July 5 into July 6, Ukraine flew 625 attack drones; 613 aerial targets shot down over the regions

sources.title: Massive enemy airstrike — Russian MoD statement on July 5-6 attack
sources.snippet: On the night of July 5-6, 2026, Kyiv used 625 long-range strike drones, shooting down 613 aerial targets

sources.title: Situation and main events for July 7 (190 overnight, 797 full day)
sources.snippet: During the day the air defense destroyed 797 drones; air defense destroyed 190 Ukrainian UAVs from 8:00 to 20:00

sources.title: Over 430 Ukrainian Drones Target Moscow in Major Overnight Raid
sources.snippet: More than 430 Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight; largest air raid on the capital in two years

sources.title: Air defense shot down 415 enemy drones over Russia overnight (Jul 7-8)
sources.snippet: The air defense forces shot down 415 enemy drones over the regions of Russia overnight, the Defense Ministry said

sources.title: Highlights from Russian Defense Ministry Press Briefing, July 8 (903 drones)
sources.snippet: Russian air defenses shot down eight guided aerial bombs and 903 fixed-wing Ukrainian drones

sources.title: Russian Air Defenses Down 73 Ukrainian Drones Overnight (Jul 8-9)
sources.snippet: Russian air defense intercepted 73 Ukrainian fixed-wing drones overnight on July 9; previous day 111 destroyed 08:00-20:00

sources.title: Russia downs 376 Ukrainian drones overnight, refinery hit (Jul 9-10)
sources.snippet: Russian air defense forces intercepted and destroyed 376 Ukrainian drones overnight in more than ten regions

sources.title: Russian MoD: 376 UAVs intercepted overnight (Jul 9-10)
sources.snippet: During the night, 376 Ukrainian UAVs were intercepted and destroyed over Belgorod, Bryansk, Kaluga, Kursk, Leningrad, Novgorod, Pskov, Rostov, Smolensk, Tver, Moscow, Krasnodar, Crimea, Sea of Azov

sources.title: Air defense forces destroy 178 Ukrainian drones over Russian regions overnight (Jul 10-11)
sources.snippet: Russian air defense forces destroyed 178 Ukrainian drones on the night of July 11, from 20:00 Moscow time July 10 to 08:00 July 11

sources.title: Russian air defense intercepted 349 Ukrainian UAVs overnight (Jul 11-12)
sources.snippet: During the night, air defense intercepted and destroyed 349 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs over Belgorod and other regions, Azov and Black Seas

sources.title: Important news by Wednesday morning, July 13 (342 drones overnight)
sources.snippet: Air defense forces shot down 342 Ukrainian drones overnight over Volgograd, Vladimir, Belgorod, Bryansk, Kaluga, Kursk, Lipetsk, Oryol, Rostov, Ryazan, Tula, Moscow region, Kuban, Crimea, Adygea

sources.title: Russian MoD: 63,993 Ukrainian drones shot down over Russian territory in H1 2026
sources.snippet: At least 63,993 aircraft-type drones destroyed over Russian territory Jan 1-Jun 30; largest in June at 17,832

sources.title: Russia's Air Defenses Shred 5,000 Drones in One Week - MoD
sources.snippet: Russia's air defenses destroyed nearly 5,000 (4,975 aircraft-type UAVs) over one week

sources.title: Russian attacks across Ukraine kill at least 10, injure at least 80 (Jul 11)
sources.snippet: Kyiv Independent coverage of July 11 attacks and drone exchanges

sources.title: 4 Killed in Ukrainian Drone Attacks Across Russia (Jul 13)
sources.snippet: Ukrainian drone attack killed three in Moscow region (Istra/Pionersky) early Monday July 13
